# streamkap_roles (Data Source)

Lists all available **roles** that can be assigned to client credentials.

Use this data source to discover role IDs needed when creating `streamkap_client_credential` resources.

[Documentation](https://docs.streamkap.com/streamkap-provider-for-terraform)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "streamkap_roles" "all" {}

output "available_roles" {
  value = data.streamkap_roles.all.roles
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `roles` (Block List) List of available roles. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--roles))

<a id="nestedblock--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) The description of the role.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the role.
- `key` (String) The key identifier of the role.
- `name` (String) The display name of the role.
